# Copilot Instructions

- [ ] Scaffold full-stack real-time music streaming and group listening app
- [ ] Frontend: React Native + Tailwind CSS
- [ ] Backend: Node.js (ESM)
- [ ] Database: MongoDB
- [ ] Features: Auth, music streaming (Spotify/YouTube APIs, free/royalty-free audio), playlists, play/pause/next, real-time group sync, chat
- [ ] Implement all features
